name: Apple Beet Borscht
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Water or light vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, sauté caraway seeds in canola oil until fragrant.
2. Add all ingredients to the soup pot and stir to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 hours,
stirring occasionally.
4. Using an immersion blender, puree one-third of the soup and return it
to the pot.
5. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
6. Serve hot or cold with a dollop of Tofu Sour Cream.
